case_title: POTTER GLENN A. VS BALLARD LINDA P.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY POTTER GLENN A. AS TO DEFENDANT BALLARD LINDA P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BALLARD LINDA P.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POTTER GLENN A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BALLARD LINDA P. $120.00 PRINCIPAL, $33.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $153.00, FOOD SPOILED BY REFRIGERATOR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BALLARD LINDA P.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-19-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-06-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
